{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "svchost.exe interacting with an unknown and potentially malicious registry key 'VFUProvider' under HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion, which is not typical for a legitimate Windows service host.",
  "indicators": [
    "svchost.exe",
    "reg_create",
    "reg_set",
    "VFUProvider",
    "HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\VFUProvider"
